name: Atlanta Mold & Environmental Testing
description: Offers mold inspections, consultations, sampling, and removal services.

name: Fast Mold Testing Atlanta
description: Uses Marvin Lens AI technology for deep-dive inspections, provides clear reports on moisture sources and next steps; independent, no repairs.

name: LunsPro Georgia
description: Offers mold and air quality testing suitable for real estate and rental properties.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Tim at LunsPro was amazing! He answered all of my questions and was EXTREMELY thorough. They exceeded my expectations.
He was very thorough, very knowledgeable, and wanted to take the time to explain everything to me.
Our report was submitted promptly after the inspection was complete, with specific details and well written notes.
Locally and family-owned since 1984, we have performed more than 100,000 inspections with over 10,000 A+ online customer reviews.

sentiment.summary: LunsPro Georgia has an exceptionally positive reputation with customers praising their inspectors' thoroughness, professionalism, knowledge, and customer service, backed by a strong track record of 100,000+ inspections and 10,000+ A+ reviews.

name: Mill Creek Environmental
description: Offers mold inspection services for consultation and analysis of residential and commercial properties in Greater Atlanta and North Georgia areas.

name: Mold Inspection & Testing
description: Provides unbiased mold inspection and testing services without involvement in mold removal to ensure honest assessments.

name: Mold Inspection Sciences
description: Provides mold inspection, testing, allergy testing, CIRS protocol, drinking water testing, environmental risk assessment, and monitoring; performs only inspection and testing, no remediation.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: outstanding experience with Mold Inspection Sciences from start to finish
If there were than 5 stars I could Joseph- I would! SO thorough, SO patient, SO nice
Johnny and team were the ONLY inspectors that found root causes to water intrusion
Xander was one of the most professional workers that I've ever had. So unlike most kids his age

sentiment.summary: Mold Inspection Sciences has an exceptionally strong reputation with overwhelmingly positive reviews praising their inspectors' professionalism, thoroughness, expertise, and outstanding customer service.

name: SafeAir Certified Mold Inspection
description: Specializes in mold testing, air quality testing, consultation, and analysis for residential and commercial properties.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Jeremy has been a life saver for us...got all the tests done. It was super fast
extremely professional and helpful...explaining in plain English what the test results mean
very thorough inspection and gave me great advice that resulted in successful mold remediation
I'm very happy with the honesty and transparency of the inspection services SafeAir provided

sentiment.summary: SafeAir Certified Mold Inspection maintains an exceptionally strong reputation with consistently positive reviews praising Jeremy's professionalism, thoroughness, quick turnaround, and clear communication of complex mold testing results.
